# MUSICAv0_urban_AQ

### Introduction
This repository is supplementary to the manuscript “The impact of urban land surface on air quality: insights from MUSICAv0 simulation during the ASIA-AQ campaign”.

### Scripts
Scripts for generating the main text figures are provided below:

| Plot     | Title   |
| -------- | ------- |
| [Figure1](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure1_model_obs_setup.ipynb) | Model config and observation info |
| [Figure2](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure2_Thailand_ground_val.ipynb)  |  Thailand ground obs validation |
| [Figure3](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure3_DC8_flight_val.ipynb) | NASA DC8 flight validation |
| [Figure4](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure4_Bangkok_GCAS_NO2_val.ipynb) | NASA LaRC G-III validation | 
| [Figure5](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure5_val_summary.ipynb) | Model validation summary |
| [Figure6](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure6_UCPs_regression.ipynb) | Sensitivity analysis of UCPs | 
| [Figure7](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure7_urban_rural_spatial_diff.ipynb) | Urban rual spatial difference | 
| [Figure8](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure8_diurnal_CO_wind_profile.ipynb) | Diurnal CO and wind profile |
| [Figure9](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure9_urban_rural_vertical_diff.ipynb) | Urban rural vertical difference  |
| [Figure10](https://github.com/yifanc17/MUSICAv0_urban_AQ/blob/master/JGR_Figure10_O3_decomp.ipynb) | Decomposition of O3 change rate |
